creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Committed with some changes. Thanks!

Here are some tips for your next submission:

- Add DEVELOPER=yes to your /etc/make.conf to enable additional QA checks.
  It'll inform you of missing dependencies and also what to add to the port
  for them etc.

- Do not add frames around pkg-message

- Use `make makesum` to generate distinfo
